LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_AnomalyThreatsInact: Adjust the percentage of major threats that will be Anomaly-related when there is no gray pall active. Only certain minor Anomaly incidents can occur when no gray pall is active.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_AnomalyThreatsActiv: Adjust the percentage of major threats that will be Anomaly-related when a gray pall is active.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallMtbDays_Inf: Adjust the average number of days between gray pall events.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallMinTimeBetw: Adjust the minimum number of days between gray pall events.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallMaxTimeBetw: Adjust the maximum number of days between gray pall events.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallExtraThreat: Adjust the average number of hours between extra Anomaly threats during gray pall events.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallMessages: Show a message when gray palls start and end.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_MonolithLetterText: {PAWN_nameDef} has noticed an ancient monolith partly buried nearby. {PAWN_pronoun} seems to be the only person able to see it. Investigate it to learn more.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_MonolithDespawnLett: The monolith is disappearing for now. It will be back.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_CommandActionStudyM: Send {PAWN_nameDef} to study the monolith. Only {PAWN_pronoun} can see it.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_CantStudyMonolithWr: Only {PAWN_nameDef} can see and interact with the monolith.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_MonolithBDiscoveryL: {PAWN_nameDef} has finished {PAWN_possessive} study of the {MONOLITH_label}. {PAWN_pronoun} believes that {PAWN_pronoun} has pinpointed the location of an unknown sinister aura and wants to travel there to unlock its secrets. The next step is to gather your important things and caravan to the destination to build a new research facility and solve this mystery.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_MonolithBArrivalLet: {0} has arrived at the location hinted at by the monolith. Something about this place feels off. The gray pall thickens.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallSourceArriv: {0} has arrived at the source of the gray pall. The gray pall is permanent here and appears to be emanating from a large hole in the ground. If you go down there, be sure to go prepared.
LanguageData.AnomalyRemixGrayPall_GrayPallSourceDisco: {PAWN_nameDef} has finished {PAWN_possessive} study of the {MONOLITH_label} and discovered the exact location of the source of the gray pall. Go there to finally stop the gray pall from corrupting this world.\n\nBe prepared for anything.
